name: Chichén Itzá
description: One of the most famous Maya archaeological sites, known for the Temple of Kukulcán.

name: Teotihuacan
description: Ancient Mesoamerican city famous for the Pyramid of the Sun and the Avenue of the Dead.

name: Palenque
description: Maya city known for its elegant architecture and inscriptions.

name: Monte Albán
description: Major Zapotec ceremonial center overlooking the Oaxaca Valley.

name: Tulum
description: Coastal Maya city overlooking the Caribbean Sea.

name: Uxmal
description: Important Maya city known for the Pyramid of the Magician.

name: Calakmul
description: One of the largest Maya cities, deep in the jungles of Campeche.

name: El Tajín
description: Famous for the Pyramid of the Niches and intricate stone carvings.

name: Cobá
description: Large Maya site with the tallest pyramid in the Yucatán Peninsula.

name: Edzná
description: Archaeological site with a large ceremonial complex and temples.

name: Xochicalco
description: Fortified hilltop city known for astronomical observatories.

name: Mitla
description: Famous for its intricate geometric mosaic stonework.

name: Bonampak
description: Known for its remarkably preserved Maya murals.

name: Yaxchilán
description: Maya city located along the Usumacinta River.

name: Tula
description: Toltec capital famous for its giant warrior statues.

name: La Venta
description: Important Olmec ceremonial center with colossal heads.

name: San Lorenzo
description: One of the earliest major Olmec cities.

name: Comalcalco
description: Unique Maya city built primarily with bricks instead of stone.

name: Ek' Balam
description: Known for its impressive stucco sculptures.

name: Dzibilchaltún
description: Site famous for the Temple of the Seven Dolls aligned with the equinox.
